span.div:
V4 CONTINUITY
GRAPH
nodes = files ∪ decisions

div.style: color: rgb(201, 209, 217) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
V6 GAUSS LEARNING
(EMA)
r_new = αs + (1−α)r · α = 0.3

span.div:
V2 BAYESIAN
TRUST SCORING
prior Beta(2,2) · α ← α+ℓ · β ← β+(1−ℓ)

div.div: hook · ordered review · red-team low-trust · τ ≈ ~20ms/change

div.style: color: rgb(201, 209, 217) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
V3 INFORMATION-GAIN
ORDERING
IG(X) = H(X) = −p log₂ p − (1−p) log₂(1−p)

span.div:
V5 ADVERSARIAL
SELF-REVIEW
triggered when trust < 0.4
